prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约3782→21135→19780→18563→18418。2022年起受护理学专业单独招生影响，最低位次大幅后移至2万名左右；2023–2025年逐年小幅前移（19780→18563→18418），近3年累计前移约1362名。2025年基准约18418名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为1152→1155→1120→1118→1070人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划1233人，较2025年扩招163人（增幅约15.23%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取门槛，使最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2024年第8名，2025–2026年第9名，稳居全国Top10顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏正面，新闻传播学科排名稳居前列，食堂排名全国第一获广泛好评；抖音热度总排名第22（较热），2021年曾排第2（高热），近年热度保持中上水平；无投档断档或暴跌记录，报考心理稳定；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共17个，其中A+学科3个（光学工程、机械工程、电气工程），A学科4个（动力工程及工程热物理、材料科学与工程、物理学、计算机科学与技术、管理科学与工程），覆盖该校绝大多数工科招生专业，学科实力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐或高热推荐，社会报考热度高；临床医学、口腔医学持续推荐；土木建筑、生化环材等明显劝退。本省2026年物理类考生估算约25.15万人（较2025年增加约1700人），竞争略有加剧；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，为本省唯一一所全国Top10的985高校，本省招生占比极高（物理类2025年计划1070人，占全国招生计划较大比例），本地考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招15.23%使最低位次后移约1683名，但学校声誉偏正面、抖音热度较热、优势学科群实力雄厚、计算机/电气等热门专业持续高热，将吸引更多高分考生报考，对位次后移形成对冲。同时本省物理类考生增加约1700人，竞争略加剧。经综合权衡，预测2026年物理类最低位次约20051名，区间19551–20551名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3782 → 21135 → 19780 → 18563 → 18418. Starting in 2022, due to the separate enrollment of the Nursing major, the minimum ranking significantly dropped to around 20,000; from 2023 to 2025, it gradually moved forward year by year (19780 → 18563 → 18418), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1,362 positions over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 18,418. The local Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 1152 → 1155 → 1120 → 1118 → 1070, showing a slight decreasing trend year by year. The 2026 plan is 1,233, an increase of 163 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 15.23%), which is significant and will directly lower the admission threshold, causing the minimum ranking to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2024, and 9th from 2025 to 2026, firmly among the top 10 top universities in China. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is generally positive, with the Journalism and Communication discipline ranking steadily at the forefront, and the cafeteria ranking first nationwide receiving widespread praise. The Douyin popularity ranking is 22nd overall (relatively hot), and it was ranked 2nd in 2021 (very hot), maintaining a medium-to-high level of popularity in recent years. There are no records of filing gaps or sharp drops, and the application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including 3 A+ disciplines (Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering), covering the vast majority of the university's engineering enrollment majors, with extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended or very highly recommended, with high social application popularity. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be recommended. Civil Engineering and Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 251,500 (an increase of about 1,700 compared to 2025), with slightly intensified competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and is the only top 10 985 university in the province. The proportion of local enrollment is very high (the Physics Category plan for 2025 is 1,070, accounting for a large proportion of the national enrollment plan), and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, with significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant enrollment expansion of 15.23% in 2026, which will cause the minimum ranking to move backward by about 1,683 positions, but the university's reputation is generally positive, Douyin popularity is relatively hot, the advantageous discipline group is strong, and popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering continue to be very hot, which will attract more high-scoring candidates to apply, offsetting the backward shift. At the same time, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province increases by about 1,700, slightly intensifying competition. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 20,051, with a range of 19,551 to 20,551.

It is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation levels for a reasonable mix.

Although law, Chinese language and literature, etc., are not separately rated, they are relatively strong due to the university's comprehensive strength.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势修正，预测2026年华中科技大学医学类在湖北省的最低录取位次约为15382名，波动区间预计在14920名至15844名之间。招生计划大幅缩减 是位次前移的主要驱动因素，同时近年位次缓慢上升的趋势起到一定缓冲作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Hubei Province over the past four years are: 2021: 3782 (planned enrollment 114), 2022: 21135 (planned enrollment 170), 2023: 19780 (planned enrollment 151), 2024: 18563 (planned enrollment 168). Data for 2025 is missing. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is significantly reduced to 117 (a decrease of 51 from 2024, a reduction of approximately 30.4%). This reduction will notably increase competition, leading to an upward shift in admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, one of the first batch of '985 Project' and '211 Project' key construction universities, and selected for the national 'Double First-Class' construction university list. Its Tongji Medical College is one of the top medical schools in China, with strong medical disciplines and a very high reputation for clinical medicine and other specialties, exerting a sustained strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core specialties such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College is located in Wuhan, a central city in the Central China region, with abundant medical resources and broad employment prospects, offering natural geographical advantages and appeal to candidates within Hubei Province. The provincial medical enrollment scale is significantly shrinking in 2026, further intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent ranking trend corrections, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology's medical category in Hubei Province in 2026 is approximately 15382, with a fluctuation range expected between 14920 and 15844. The significant reduction in enrollment plans is the main driving factor for the upward shift in rankings, while the slow upward trend in recent rankings provides a certain buffering effect.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Stomatology
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Qiming Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Clinical medicine and stomatology are the most competitive, preventive medicine and forensic medicine have moderate admission difficulty, and nursing has a relatively lower admission threshold.
